note: This plan launches native and SplitZip PD-disaggregated SGLang runs. The SplitZip mode expects the SGLang-side hook to read SPLITZIP_SGLANG_ENABLE=1.

commands.prefill: python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3-32B --trust-remote-code --tp 1 --kv-cache-dtype bfloat16 --disaggregation-mode prefill --base-gpu-id 1 --port 30100 --disaggregation-bootstrap-port 8998 --disaggregation-transfer-backend mooncake
commands.decode: python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path Qwen/Qwen3-32B --trust-remote-code --tp 1 --kv-cache-dtype bfloat16 --disaggregation-mode decode --base-gpu-id 2 --port 30200 --disaggregation-transfer-backend mooncake
